caption: A woman with dark hair and skin wears large black over-the-ear headphones and a blue and white striped collared shirt. She is positioned in an indoor setting against a plain white wall, with a light-colored curtain hanging to her left. The woman is facing the camera and speaking, with her mouth opening and closing slightly as she talks. To her right, a pale-colored piece of furniture is partially visible. In the bottom left corner of each frame, the on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" appears in white. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a stable, centered position, and the only movement is the subtle shifting of her facial expressions and lips as she continues to speak.
